6:[["$","meta","0",{"name":"viewport","content":"width=device-width, initial-scale=1"}],["$","meta","1",{"charSet":"utf-8"}],["$","title","2",{"children":"Deep Research Arena · Reproducible Elo benchmark for DR agents"}],["$","meta","3",{"name":"description","content":"Eight open-source Deep Research frameworks, 107 sandbox tasks, 7 evaluation pillars, 95% bootstrap CIs. 1:null
